Selection misuse: bad targets, orphan and ambiguous case providers,
duplicate cases, unresolvable keys.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- store/store.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
	Mode string `yaml:"mode"`
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Store interface {
	Greet(name string) string
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.mode
type Cache interface {
	Get(key string) string
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.missing
type Queue interface {
	Push(v string)
}

type Both struct{}

func (*Both) Greet(name string) string { return name }
func (*Both) Get(key string) string    { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=both
func NewBoth() *Both { return nil }

type Orphan struct{}

//fabrik:provider case=orphan
func NewOrphan() *Orphan { return nil }

type Q struct{}

func (*Q) Push(v string) {}

//fabrik:provider case=a
func NewQA() *Q { return nil }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"
)

type API struct {
	Store store.Store
	Cache store.Cache
	Queue store.Queue
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (a *API) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: store/store.go:9:1: config key "store.kind" defaults to "memory", which matches no case= implementation
  help: known cases: both; add a provider with case=memory or fix the default: tag
error: store/store.go:19:1: config key "store.missing" does not match any //fabrik:config field
  help: declare the key as a string field of a //fabrik:config struct
error: store/store.go:29:1: case= provider matches multiple selected interfaces: app/store.Cache, app/store.Store
  help: a case provider must implement exactly one selected interface
error: store/store.go:34:1: case= provider matches no //fabrik:provider:select interface
  help: declare //fabrik:provider:select <config-key> on the interface this type implements
